breaking.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
breaking.summary: Five people are killed and at least 35 injured as Ukraine's two largest cities are targeted, as Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

breaking.title: US and Iran trade fire after two US soldiers killed in Jordan
breaking.summary: Kuwait says an electricity and water plant is on fire after the second such attack in two days. Iran says US strikes hit an under-construction nuclear power plant.

breaking.title: 1 Killed, 16 Injured in One of Russia's Largest Missile Barrages Yet On Kyiv
breaking.summary: Kyiv has for months been targeting Russia's oil industry

breaking.title: Roads turn death traps for gig workers in Kerala
breaking.summary: Over 30 such workers, mostly food delivery personnel, have been killed in road accidents in the State in the past one year, as per informal data collected by a union. Time constraints coupled with heavy traffic often contribute to the higher number of fatalities, those involved in the sector say

breaking.title: Jammu and Kashmir rains LIVE: At least 12 dead, several missing in flash floods; rescue ops. under way
breaking.summary: Home Minister Amit Shah assured the L-G and the CM of all possible assistance from the Centre for the safety and security of the affected people, officials said

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Iranian missile hits Jordan's Aqaba Airport, reports Iran state media
breaking.summary: The Israeli military said it had identified and intercepted missiles launched from Iran towards Aqaba in Jordan

breaking.title: ‘Security hole’ enabled US-Israel bombing of Ayatollah’s residence: Iran minister Araghchi
breaking.summary: Iranian foreign minister Seyyed Abbas Araghchi alleged a security breach allowed foreign powers access. This breach reportedly provided intelligence and influenced decision-making during a conflict. He stated attackers knew Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's routine and targeted his residence precisely. A regional leader had warned Iran about leadership being targeted before the conflict began. Araghchi noted the foreign ministry remained operational throughout the intense 40-day war.

breaking.title: Sirens, Strikes, Shattered Deal: Middle East On Edge As US, Iran Trade Blows
breaking.summary: Behind this latest flare-up lies a collapsed peace effort.
